narrative: Machine Learning Engineer at LinkedIn with seven years of experience, bringing solid product‑company exposure and a strong fit for a senior AI/ML role. The primary ranking driver is the above‑average match to the job‑specific skill set, especially in retrieval‑focused technologies. Proven hands‑on work with LlamaIndex and BM25 demonstrates capability to build and fine‑tune search pipelines, while experience with LoRA, QLoRA and TensorFlow shows readiness to develop large‑language‑model retrieval‑augmented generation. Availability in Bangalore aligns well with the Pune/Noida hub, and the experience level meets the 5‑9 year target. A minor concern is limited visibility into notice‑period timing, which could affect onboarding speed.
